mapper.update: UPDATE t_order SET order_status = #{targetStatus}, updated_at = NOW(), pay_channel = CASE WHEN #{payChannel} IS NOT NULL AND #{payChannel} != '' THEN #{payChannel} ELSE pay_channel END, pay_time = CASE WHEN #{payTime} IS NOT NULL THEN #{payTime} ELSE pay_time END, canceled_time = CASE WHEN #{canceledTime} IS NOT NULL THEN #{canceledTime} ELSE canceled_time END WHERE id = #{orderId} AND order_status = #{sourceStatus}
